subtasks.description: Query MongoDB to retrieve all active billing contracts with contracted annual value and contract metadata
Query SQL data warehouse to sum actual invoices issued in 2024, grouped by contract_id, to calculate total billed amount per contract

Reconcile contracted annual values against 2024 actual invoices, calculate variance percentage, and flag contracts with >10% material variance (both positive and negative). Produce a reconciliation report with contract ID, contracted value, actual 2024 invoices, variance amount, variance %, and flag status.

plan.cost_rationale: This query requires data from two distinct sources (MongoDB contracts + SQL invoices), making cross_recon essential for reconciliation and variance flagging. The mongo_query and sql_gen subtasks are simple single-source retrievals assigned to small tier—straightforward document/table scans with filtering on contract status and invoice date. The cross_recon subtask is mid-tier because it performs variance calculation and threshold-based flagging across both datasets, which requires moderate logic to handle matching contracts, percentage calculation, and rule-based flagging. The plan has 3 subtasks because reconciliation across two sources inherently requires separate data retrieval followed by reconciliation logic; combining data pulls would lose the two-source context that defines cross_recon's role."

output.sql: SELECT invoice_facts.contract_id, SUM(invoice_facts.amount_usd) AS total_billed_2024 FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_facts.invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_facts.invoice_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY invoice_facts.contract_id ORDER BY invoice_facts.contract_id
